description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, test, and deploy using microsoft/aspnetcore-build:2.0 as the default Docker image. Add a build_job in the build stage that runs ./build.sh and publishes the directories saycle.server/bin/Release/netcoreapp2.0/ubuntu.16.04-x64 and saycle.server/bin/Release/netcoreapp2.0/ubuntu.16.10-x64 as artifacts that expire after 1 week. Add a test_job in the test stage that runs ./test.sh and keeps its artifacts for 1 week. Add a deploy_job in the deploy stage that uses the ruby:2.2 image, runs only on the master branch, depends on build_job and test_job, installs the dpl gem with gem install dpl, and deploys to Heroku via dpl --provider=heroku --app=saycle-server-live using the $HEROKU_PRODUCTION_API_KEY variable.
